titleStmt.title: SII 15.230: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 230. (A.R. No. 443 of 1926.) BOKYAPUR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Vīrabhadra temple.

This is dated the 17th regnal year of the king, Subhānu, Pushya śu. 10, Monday, Saṅkramaṇa. The date is irregular. In the said cyclic year corresponding to 1163 A.D., the tithi corresponded to December 7 which was Saturday. The Saṅkramaṇa, obviously Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, occurred on December 26, Thursday.

It records a gift of wet land for worship, offerings and burning a lamp, to the god Svayaṁbhu of Arasigeṟe, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Śivachitta-Vīra-Permāḍi who was governing Koṁkaṇa Nine-Hundred and Halasige Twelve-Thousand from Gōve. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Śivaśakti-paṇḍita, disciple of Kēdāraśakti-paṇḍita. Two more gifts to the deity are also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
ṁbujalakṣmige maiḷalamahādēvi bhūpāḷakaṁ
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ samastabhu
vanasaṁstūyamānaharadharaṇīprasota triḷōcanakadaṁbavaṁśamahōdayamahī dharēṁdra
śikharābhyudayamānamahāpracaṁdamārttaṁḍa mārttaṁḍakarātitībranijapratāpavaśīkri
tasakaḷamahīmaṁḍaḷanuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁbhana vānaramahādhvaja permmaṭṭitūryyani
rgghōṣaṇa caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭitāṣṭādaśāśvamēdhadīkṣākuḷaprasū
taṁ himavadgirīṁdraruṁdraśikharasaṁsthāpitamahā tyāgajagajhaṁ
pa jhaṁpaḷācāryya niśśaṁkarāma subhaṭakanakanikaṣōpaḷaṁ śaraṇāgatavajraprākāra lō
kaikakaḷpadruma saṁkrāntidhavaḷa mūrttinārāyaṇa kīrttimārttaṇḍa maṇḍaḷikala lāṭapaṭṭa vai
righaraṭṭa subhaṭarājaśikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇītyakhiḷanāmāvaḷī virājitara
ppa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ mahāmāhēśvaraṁ śrī śivacittavīra permmūḍidēvarasaru
koṁkaṇavoṁbhainūṟumaṁ halasige hannicchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭaprati pāḷana
dināḷdu gōveya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire .
Udayācaḷadoḷdinakaranudiyi nintirekaḍaṁbakuḷave ghanaśikhari śikharadoḷudi
yisidaṁ viśadakīrtti parmmāḍinṛpaṁ . Intenisida kādaṁba śivacitta vīrapermmāḍidēvarasaru biṭṭa dharmmamenteṁdaḍe .
śrīmaccaturddaśabhuvanādhiṣṭāyakaṁ śatānanda mukunda saṁkrandanādi sarvva gīrvvāṇaika tanayanāgni
nirddagdhakusumasāyaka . sakaḷalōkābhīṣṭaphaḷadāyaka pratyakṣaprasiddhamapparasigeṟeya śrī svayaṁ
bhudēvara nivēdyakke muṁdaṇa keṟeya keḷegirvvaṇḍi bhattada gadde taḷavṛttiyāgire mattaṁ svasti śrīkādaṁba
śivacitta vīrapermmāḍidēvavarśada 17 neya śubhānu saṁvatsarada puṣyamāsa śuddha 10 sōmavāra saṁ
kramaṇadaṁdarasigeṟeya śrīsvayaṁbhudēvara nivēdyakke caitra pavitrakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ
nandādīvigegaṁ jērijavāḍada holadoḷage taḍakōḍa hola sīmeyiṁ mūḍalu hagara geya hola sīme
yiṁ baḍagalinnēsaṟalu . narēṁdrapurada hiriya kōlaloṁdu mattaregalavirvvaḍagalu panneraḍu mattaranida
loṁdu bhāga haraḷu bhāgamāda bhūmiyoḷu yumanu jērijavāḍadoḷage keyi māḍu vokkaliṁge rā
jahastadalu 40 kayyaddha mane 20 kayya goṭṭagemaneyaṁ Arasigeṟeyoḷage rāja hastadalu
60 keyya maṭhada maneya śrīsvayaṁbhudēvapādārādhakarappa kēdāraśaktipaṁḍitara putraṁ
śivaśaktipaṁḍitargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭaru . tatpādapadmōpa jīvi .
saveḍiya kāveya sāvantanuṁ maḷḷaseṇageya sāvantanuṁ tammāḷkeya dumavāḍadalu meyya
lirvvaṇḍi bhattada gaddeyaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhudēvargge sarvvanamasyadi biṭṭaru . mattaṁ taḍa kōḍa pannirvvaru saṁkramaṇadande
ḍeya kēriya huḷilēśvaradēvariṁ mūḍalirppatōṁṭa keyya maneyaṁ dēvargge sarvva namasyamāgi biṭṭaru .
Intī dharmmamanāvapratipāḷisidavaṁ gaṁge gaye vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrameṁba puṇya tīrtthaṁgaḷo
ḷu sāyire kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷoḷkaṭṭisi sāyira sabrāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phaḷamakku .
Intī dharmamanāva gavaṁgantanituṁ puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷsāyira kavilevaṁ sāyira sakhrāhna
ṇarumanaḷida pātakamakku . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭiva
rṣa sahasrā jāyatē krimiḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 15.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
